title: malus × purpurea f. lemoinei
intro: Malus × purpurea f. lemoinei, also known as Lemoine's crabapple, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus × purpurea f. lemoinei include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's fruit, bark, and leaves can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
